beta.changelog:
- Migrate from legacy to newer adreno gpu path
- Add swapiness support

stable.changelog:
- We are now on Play Store 🎉
- Removed the built-in in-app updater
- Added a floating bottom navigation bar
- Added a highly customizable glassmorphic theme
- Improved frosted theme visibility
- Merged Doze App and Kill on Swipe into a single option
- Fixed Xposed injection status detection
- Added a changelog dialog after a successful update
- Fixed battery statistics being empty after clearing the app's data
- Fixed automated profiles not working after restoring a backup
